schemaVersion.description: Versioned contract identifier. Change only when the data contract becomes incompatible.

contentId.description: Globally unique, stable content identifier. Use lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens.

generatedAt.description: Time the complete content document was generated.

displayTitle.description: Concise title used in the Pulse XHS email subject and header.

accountId.description: Stable Pulse account identifier, such as primary.

displayName.description: Optional current public account name without changing the stable accountId.

repository.description: GitHub repository in owner/name form containing the operator rules.

commitSha.description: Exact 40-character Git commit used to produce the content.

operator.description: Immutable provenance for the operator rules used during generation.

title.description: Concise factual title for the underlying event.

whyItMatters.description: Why the event is consequential enough to publish.

domains.description: Ordered editorial domains, with the primary domain first.

event.description: Event context supporting the final Xiaohongshu post.

sourceId.description: Unique source identifier referenced by candidates.

url.description: Canonical public HTTPS page supporting the stated facts.

publishedAt.description: Source publication time when reliably available.

items.description: A traceable source used to verify the event or candidate claims.

sources.description: Verified sources. sourceId values must be unique and support the final post.

imageId.description: Unique image identifier referenced by candidates.

url.description: Direct public HTTPS image URL downloaded temporarily by Relay.

sourcePageUrl.description: Public HTTPS page where the image originally appears.

alt.description: Accessible description of the image content.

caption.description: Optional concise explanation of why the image matters.

sourceName.description: Organization or publisher that supplied the image.

usage.description: Whether the image is the main visual or supporting evidence.

items.description: Optional evidence or explanatory image. Images are never required to fill a quota.

images.description: Zero to four useful images. imageId values must be unique.

titleId.description: Unique title identifier within this content document.

items.description: One complete title option for the final post.

titles.description: One to four materially different title options. titleId values must be unique.

recommendedTitleId.description: Title recommended as the default option.

body.description: Complete publishable Simplified Chinese post body.

tags.description: Zero to ten Xiaohongshu tags without # prefixes.

coverText.description: Optional concise text intended for the cover image.

items.description: Stable identifier local to this content document. Use letters, digits, underscores, or hyphens.

sourceIds.description: Source IDs supporting the final Xiaohongshu content. Every referenced ID must exist.

items.description: Stable identifier local to this content document. Use letters, digits, underscores, or hyphens.

imageIds.description: Image IDs intended for the final post. Use an empty array when no image adds value.

title: Pulse XHS Content v1
description: Complete immutable Xiaohongshu content produced by Pulse XHS and delivered by Pulse Relay. Referenced sourceIds, imageIds, and recommendedTitleId must resolve to top-level entries.
